summary: This is an extremely brief announcement post linking to the wlroots whitepaper PDF. wlroots is the modular Wayland compositor library that Drew DeVault created as the foundation for sway and other Wayland compositors. The post contains no substantive text beyond the link itself, serving purely as a signal boost for the published document. It reflects DeVault's terse, no-nonsense communication style.
key_points: The wlroots whitepaper was made publicly available as a PDF hosted on SourceHut
The post is a minimal announcement with only two words of content plus a link
wlroots represents DeVault's effort to create a shared foundation for Wayland compositor development
key_insight: The wlroots whitepaper was published, documenting the architecture of the modular Wayland compositor library that underpins sway and other compositors.
